current_issue.title: [ScoreRebound] Project scaffold — Next.js 15 + Bun + Tailwind + Supabase
current_issue.reason: RE-SELECTING: Issue #2 remains the highest priority unblocked issue with no open PR. ScoreRebound has wave=right_now (2.2M student loan borrowers in crisis NOW), making it the most time-sensitive product. Scaffold code exists locally on main as uncommitted/untracked files (src/, e2e/, package.json, etc.) from a previous implementation pass, but NO commit was made and NO PR was created — the work is incomplete. The implementation worker MUST: (1) verify the scaffold builds/lints/passes tests, (2) commit all scaffold files on a feature branch, (3) push and create a PR. This unblocks 7 downstream P0 issues: #4 (DB schema), #14 (core quiz engine), #19 (landing page), #28 (auth), #33 (Stripe), #41 (CI/CD), #48 (E2E tests). NOTE: Duplicate scaffold issues exist (#72, #79) — these should be closed as duplicates after #2 is merged.
